---
image: img.png
title: Spontaneous and dynamic emotional facial expressions reflect action readiness
author: Anna Tcherkassof & Damien Dupré
description: World Congress on Facial Expression of Emotion (WCFEE 2014)
date: '2014-10-11'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

World Congress on Facial Expression of Emotion (WCFEE 2014)

:::
